mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendations (user_id, recording_id, item_id, category, label, forgetting_score, recommendation_text, exercises, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordingId}, #{itemId}, #{category}, #{label}, #{forgettingScore}, #{recommendationText}, #{exercises, typeHandler=com.remelearning.recommendation.mapper.StringListJsonTypeHandler}, now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET recording_id = EXCLUDED.recording_id, category = EXCLUDED.category, label = EXCLUDED.label, forgetting_score = EXCLUDED.forgetting_score, recommendation_text = EXCLUDED.recommendation_text, exercises = EXCLUDED.exercises, updated_at = now()
